auth.loginErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.loginErrorNetwork: No connection. Check your network and try again.
auth.loginErrorAccountExists: This account already exists with a different sign-in method.

home.loadFirstItemDesc: Start digitizing your wardrobe so GORYUZ can advise you.

permissions.cameraMessage: GORYUZ needs camera access to photograph your clothing. Please allow access in your device settings.
permissions.photoMessage: GORYUZ needs photo library access to select clothing images. Please allow access in your device settings.

collection.title: My Collection
collection.emptySubtitle: Add your first piece and let AI organize your wardrobe.
collection.addFromGalleryDesc: Select an existing image from your files.
collection.scanningSubtitle: Choose how you want to add your clothing.
collection.scanningSuccess: Found your pieces! Select which ones to add.
collection.noItemsFound: No pieces could be identified. Please try another photo.
collection.gemScanCostNotice: Scanning deducts {{cost}} Gems upfront, regardless of how many pieces you save.
collection.gemCostNotice: Each piece you choose to save will deduct {{cost}} additional Gems.
collection.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
collection.secondLifeSubtitle: Give your piece a new life
collection.secondLifeGiftDesc: Give it to someone who'll love it
collection.errorScan: Could not scan image. Please try again.
collection.errorAdd: Could not save pieces. Please try again.
collection.errorRename: Could not rename piece. Please try again.
collection.errorDelete: Could not delete piece. Please try again.
